findings: bin/stampede.sh default MODEL is claude-haiku-4.5 (banned/cheap) unless overridden; creates risk of unintended cheap model usage in non-metaswarm runs.
skills/SKILL.md docs claim default model claude-sonnet-4.5, conflicting with launcher default.
Metaswarm premium/banned model policy is largely instructional for commander/children; launcher enforces banned models only for initial metaswarm --model/--models selection.
Model policy metadata (premium pool + banned list) is written to state/metadata, but child launches are not mechanically blocked from using banned models.
Custom --agent-cmd templates can omit {model}, potentially causing silent fallback to external CLI defaults.
